scripts.build-prod: npm run set-env-prod && vite build --mode prod --emptyOutDir
scripts.build-remotedev: npm run set-env-remotedev && vite build --mode remotedev --emptyOutDir
scripts.build-rust-wasm: cd src-rust && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/src_rust.wasm --out-dir ../pkg --target web && cd ..
scripts.build-old-site-localhost: npm run build-rust-wasm && npm run build-localhost --emptyOutDir
scripts.build-old-site-prod: npm run build-rust-wasm && npm run build-prod --emptyOutDir
scripts.build-old-site-remotedev: npm run build-rust-wasm && npm run build-remotedev --emptyOutDir
